channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Has anybody seen Nigel? Speculation swirls as Farage performs disappearing act
item.description: Has anybody seen Nigel? Speculation swirls as Farage performs disappearing act

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Can Burnham turn ‘Manchesterism’ into a practical offer for government?

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): John Healey says Labour infighting puts government’s credibility at risk

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Ministers accused of cover-up after admitting withholding some Mandelson files
item.description: Ministers accused of cover-up after admitting withholding some Mandelson files

item.title: FT UK Politics: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Delusional, desperate and mostly called David, Brexiters gather to lament the Great Betrayal | John Crace
